text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
Oooh! Look at all the pretty, colorful drinks
they're selling! I wanna try that one!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Hngh! That statue over there! It's so glorious! I
won't let it outshine me, though! BAKUSHIN!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Hey, don't just run off like that! You're not even
going the right direction!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I spot some familiar faces while walking past the
station, but things seem to be a bit hectic.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Omigosh, Traineeer! Perfect timing!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: A bunch of us had planned to go out today...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
But Ikuno and Flower had to bail, so now
everything's a mess!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: ...Hey! Where'd they go?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That's how I get swept up into Mejiro Palmer's
outing with her friends.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Oho! The trains are running! But do you know who else can run, and even faster than a train? Me! Time to prove it!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
I'm super fast, too! I won't let a measly train or
two beat me!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Hey! Don't run into the river!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
What's this? A zoo!? Well, no cheetah can
outspeed me!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: Or me! Eat my dust, cheetahs!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: No running in a crowd!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Well, well, well! Who would've thought we'd find
a suspension bridge here of all places! I bet I can
beat everyone to the other side!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: Nuh-uh! I'm gonna be number one! Outta my way!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Ack! Stop, stop! That's too dangerous!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Wheeze, wheeze... Seriously, what are those two made of?! How can they still be running?!
choice_data_list: Looks like all we can do is follow them...
Maybe we should give them a destination.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Haha... Yeah, I guess, huh?

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: Heeey! Palmeeer! Come over heeere!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Yeah, yeah... Comiiing...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, we keep wandering about endlessly and
aimlessly...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Hm?! Incredible! Palmer! Palmer!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Yeah? What is it this ti—

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Oh, wow!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Look at all these flowers in full bloom! They're
almost as pretty and vibrant as cherry blossoms!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: Ohhh! Look at 'em all! They're so colorful!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, they're super pretty! Who'd've thunk we'd
end up someplace like this?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Hehehe! There's only one thing to do when you're
in a spot as scenic as this, and that's...

text_block_list.name: Palmer and Turbo
text_block_list.text:
To Bakushin, yeah?!
To Bakushin, right?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Hey! That's my line!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The three of them chase each other through the
fields for a while. Watching such a heartwarming
sight puts a smile on my face.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Hm, that makes sense. Do you have a specific
place in mind?
choice_data_list: Is there anywhere you want to go?
Is there anywhere you want to go?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: A place I want to go? Ooh, I know.

text_block_list.name: Bakushin O and Turbo
text_block_list.text: WHOOOA!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
What a view! It's so spectacular, my heart is going
full Bakushin!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
That building is all sparkly! And that one's all
spiky! What even is that one?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Ahaha! I'm glad you two like it here!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
See how the view stretches all the way to the
horizon?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
We ran a ton today, but there are still so many
other places we can run to!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Doesn't everything seem a million times more fun
when you think of things that way?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Twin Turbo and Sakura Bakushin O nod in
agreement. The endless blue sky is filled with
hope for the future.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Yeah, I totally get what you mean!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
The urge to Bakushin right now is overwhelming!
Race me to that horizon!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Aaand there we go, right off track again...
